summary: Automatic local-subprocess work is exhausted. Remaining audit tasks require explicit audit results or an interactive provider such as claude-code, opencode, or subprocess-template.

suggested_inputs.description: Import structured audit-review results after manual or provider-assisted review finishes.
Merge runtime validation evidence updates gathered outside the wrapper.
Import normalized external analyzer results such as Semgrep findings.

interactive_provider_hint: Current provider is local-subprocess. If you want the backend to continue through an interactive provider instead of importing results manually, set "provider" in C:\Code\OpenCode-NIM\.audit-artifacts\session-config.json to "auto", "claude-code", "opencode", "subprocess-template", or "vscode-task", then run audit-code again from the repository root.
